api_token.description: Pivotal Tracker API token. Sent as the X-TrackerToken header on every request; never logged.

base_url.description: Pivotal Tracker API base URL override for tests or proxies.

project_id.description: Pivotal Tracker project id. Required by the stories, iterations, and epics streams, which read from projects/{project_id}/{resource}; not used by the projects stream itself.
